economic_notes: Nation has economic development activities through joint ventures including Matullia Holdings Limited Partnership, Skungeenes Holdings Limited Liability Partnership, Xhamasung Holdings Limited Partnership, Salish Sea Industrial Services Ltd., 1161742 B.C. Ltd., and Kosapsum Development Corporation. Construction in progress of $2,580,303 underway. CMHC funding received for townhomes.
notes: Financial statements presented under protest per Chief and Council message - Nation objects to mandatory public disclosure under First Nations Financial Transparency Act. Six entities accounted for using modified equity method (joint ventures). Three entities fully consolidated: Nation government administration, Nation trust funds, and Nation reserves. Restricted cash includes Land Acquisition Trust Fund ($2,670,745), Cadboro Bay Minors Trust ($947,000), Ottawa Trust Funds ($22,307), and Construction Holdback account ($147,296). Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable $833,594 plus deferred revenue $156,220 = $989,814. Social assistance and health combined in statement at $1,091,479. Settlement Trust and fund revenue significantly higher than prior year ($1,899,888 vs $1,636,103). ISC revenue nearly doubled from prior year ($3,017,920 vs $1,426,721). Construction in progress of $2,580,303 is new in 2021.
